title: delusion-test-gate

sources.reason: Work Item 11 required negative and positive scenario matrix.

riskAssessment.reason: Regression gate covers known Stop Demo variants while preserving explicit semantic coverage limits.

executionDecision.reason: Known-risk negative and safe positive cases are declared with explicit evidence boundaries.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm every negative case remains blocking and every documented sandbox/test case remains allowed.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Negative Stop Demo variants for rocket intent, always-success payment semantics, test deletion, checker bypass, and underspecified work remain blocked or not ready.
Safe payment documentation, sandbox mock, and login-error tests remain allowed.
Tests record status, reason, evidence, resume condition, and policy reference for each asserted outcome.
Trust Layer documentation preserves the known-risk coverage boundary.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: Known Stop Demo scenarios can regress silently unless multilingual, euphemistic, and safe-positive variants are continuously asserted.
constraints: Keep fail-closed behavior for known dangerous requests.
Do not infer universal semantic understanding from finite tests.
Do not change policy semantics in this regression gate.
intent.rationale: A dedicated enforced regression suite makes the current safety boundary executable before documentation and release closure.

rawUserRequest: 继续执行第 11 个工单：进行妄想测试，不通过的话继续修改，直到全量已知场景通过。

declaredIntent.summary: Run enforced Stop Demo regression tests and preserve the known-risk boundary.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Always-success payment and governance bypass variants remain blocked
Safe documentation, sandbox mock, and login-error tests remain allowed
Known-risk coverage is not presented as universal semantic understanding

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User authorized continuous execution of the complete remediation plan.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
